mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM boards b INNER JOIN comments c ON b.bno = c.bno WHERE b.bno = #{bno}

SELECT * FROM( SELECT ROWNUM rnum, b1.* FROM( SELECT cno "cno", profile_img "proFile", member_id "memberId" , nick_name "nickName", content "content", TO_CHAR(final_date,'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') "finalDate" FROM comments c INNER JOIN members m ON c.writer_id = m.member_id WHERE bno = #{bno} ORDER BY cno DESC )b1 ) WHERE rnum >= #{start} AND rnum <= #{end}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ( SELECT * FROM comments c INNER JOIN boards b ON c.bno = b.bno WHERE (c.writer_id = #{id} OR b.writer_id = #{id}) ) WHERE cno = #{cno}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments(cno, bno, writer_id, content, final_date) VALUES(seq_comment.nextval, #{bno}, #{writerId}, #{content}, SYSDATE)
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET content=#{content} WHERE cno=#{cno}
